speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning . Vane Theater , at your service .

speaker: speaker2
text: Hello . I'm thinking about watching a Chinese traditional opera with a foreign girl . What's on this weekend ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , there will be charity performance on Saturday night . And also , there will be a solo concert by an opera star on Sunday night .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's a good thing that I have choices here . Can you tell me about the one on Saturday ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Sure . It's to raise money for the homeless .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , it's a reserved opera named The Monkey Creates Havoc in Heaven .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wow , a story about the clever Monkey King . It's a classic and children's favorite .

speaker: speaker1
text: It surely is . And the cast is really the best .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wonderful ! How much is the ticket ?

speaker: speaker1
text: The price varies according to the seats . 300 for the front , 200 for the middle , and 50 for the back .
